notify_on_press.label: Notify on press
notify_on_press.description: Show a desktop notification when a watch button event is received.

helper_command.label: Helper command
helper_command.description: Future command used to stream watch button events into the bridge service.

label.label: Label
label.description: Text shown next to the watch glyph in the bar.

show_label.label: Show label
show_label.description: Show text next to the watch glyph.

show_press_count.label: Show press count
show_press_count.description: Append the number of received button presses to the bar label.

hide_disconnected.label: Hide while disconnected
hide_disconnected.description: Hide the bar widget until the bridge reports a connected watch.
